channel.title: 算法s on 小白博客
channel.description: Recent content in 算法s on 小白博客

item.title: 二分法查找
item.description: 例子 /* 该程序显示了怎么二分法查找 */ public class Search { public static void main(String[] args) { int[] arr= {30,20,50,10,80,9,7,12,100,40,8}; int searchWord = 20; Arrays.sort(arr); System.out.println(Arrays.toString(arr)); System.out.println(binarySearch(arr,searchWord)); } public static int binarySearch(int[] ar, int a){ int low =0; int high = ar.length -1; int temp; while(low<high){ int mid= (low+high)/2; if(a ==ar[mid]){ return mid; }if(a>ar[mid]){ low=mid+1; } if(a<ar[mid]){ high= mid+1; } } return -1; } }
